disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak nearing its end: WHO - The Peninsula Qatar
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak nearing its end: WHO The Peninsula Qatar
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称汉坦病毒疫情接近结束。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak 'nearing end' as total cases hold at 13: WHO - Türkiye Today
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak 'nearing end' as total cases hold at 13: WHO Türkiye Today
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称土耳其汉坦疫情接近结束，病例仍为13例。

updates.title_en: Scientists discover 70 existing drugs that block deadly hantavirus infections - News-Medical
updates.body_en: Scientists discover 70 existing drugs that block deadly hantavirus infections News-Medical
updates.summary_zh: 科学家发现70种现有药物可阻断汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Bend doctor on hantavirus ship released from quarantine - bendbulletin.com
updates.body_en: Bend doctor on hantavirus ship released from quarantine bendbulletin.com
updates.summary_zh: 本德医生从汉坦病毒邮轮隔离中获释。

updates.body_en: Irish survivor of deadly hantavirus cruise ship plans next voyage The Times
updates.summary_zh: 爱尔兰汉坦病毒邮轮幸存者计划再次航行。

updates.title_en: Yukon hantavirus cruise ship passenger discharged from B.C. hospital, still recovering - Yukon News

updates.body_en: US CDC to wind down hantavirus response Medical Buyer

updates.title_en: A drug repurposing screen identifies antiviral compounds against Puumala Orthohantavirus | Scientific Reports - Nature
updates.body_en: A drug repurposing screen identifies antiviral compounds against Puumala Orthohantavirus | Scientific Reports Nature
updates.summary_zh: 《自然》发表药物筛选发现抗普马拉汉坦病毒化合物。

updates.title_en: Global Hantavirus Response To End On July 2: WHO - Health and Me
updates.body_en: Global Hantavirus Response To End On July 2: WHO Health and Me
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布全球汉坦病毒应急响应将于7月2日结束。

updates.title_en: CDC concludes response to hantavirus outbreak on cruise - upi.com
updates.body_en: CDC concludes response to hantavirus outbreak on cruise upi.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束对邮轮汉坦病毒疫情的响应。

updates.body_en: Deadly Hantavirus outbreak should end on 2 July, WHO says Euronews
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称致命汉坦病毒疫情将于7月2日结束。

updates.body_en: US public health agency concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: 美国公共卫生机构结束汉坦病毒响应，疫情缓解。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO - NDTV
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO NDTV
updates.summary_zh: WHO 表示汉坦病毒疫情应于7月2日正式结束。

updates.title_en: US ends its hantavirus response as quarantines expire and threat wanes - The Independent
updates.body_en: US ends its hantavirus response as quarantines expire and threat wanes The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 美国结束汉坦病毒响应，隔离到期，威胁减弱。

updates.body_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes WSJ
